items.translation: 已将自身的游戏模式设为%s

items.source: Must be an opped player in creative mode
items.translation: 必须是处于创造模式的管理员

items.source: No items were found on %s players
items.translation: 未能从%s名玩家找到任何物品
上下文数量已达上限值（%s）

items.source: The advancement %1$s does not contain the criterion '%2$s'
You've been playing for greater than 24 hours
items.translation: 你的游戏时长已超过24小时
启用实验性收纳袋物品

items.source: Failed to load world in Safe Mode.
items.translation: 无法在安全模式下加载世界。

items.source: %1$s was squashed by a falling anvil
Are you sure you want to quit?
This demo will last five game days. Do your best!
items.translation: 此试玩版会在5个游戏日后结束，尽力而为吧！

items.source: Your game mode has been updated to %s
items.translation: 你的游戏模式已被更新为%s

items.source: By submitting this report, you confirm that the information you have provided is accurate and complete to the best of your knowledge.
items.translation: 提交此举报，即代表你确认你提供的信息已尽可能准确和完整。
编辑悬挂式告示牌消息

items.source: You are banned from this server
Do not show this screen again
Press Ctrl and Tab to switch between tabs
items.translation: 按下Ctrl键和Tab键切换标签页

items.source: This will attempt to optimize your world by making sure all data is stored in the most recent game format. This can take a very long time, depending on your world. Once done, your world may play faster but will no longer be compatible with older versions of the game. Are you sure you wish to proceed?
items.translation: 这将尝试用最新的游戏格式储存所有数据来达到优化世界的效果。取决于世界的状况，这可能会花费不少时间。一旦完成，进行游戏时可能会更流畅，但你的世界将不再与旧版游戏兼容。你确定要继续吗？

items.source:
Minecraft has run out of memory.

This could be caused by a bug in the game or by the Java Virtual Machine not being allocated enough memory.

To prevent world corruption, the current game has quit. We've tried to free up enough memory to let you go back to the main menu and back to playing, but this may not have worked.

Please restart the game if you see this message again.
items.translation:
Minecraft已耗尽内存。

原因可能是游戏存在漏洞，或分配给Java虚拟机的内存过少。

为避免世界损坏，当前游戏已退出。我们已尝试腾出内存，让你可以回到主菜单并继续游戏，但这不一定奏效。

如果你再次看见此消息，请重启游戏。

items.source: An entity is required to run this command here
items.translation: 需要一个实体来执行此命令

items.source: Could not find world with the provided identifier
items.translation: 无法找到具有指定标识符的世界
自动（取决于Realm所有者的延迟）

items.source: No amount of rest can pass this night
items.translation: 已入睡玩家的数量不足以跳过夜晚

items.source: Loading worlds from folders with symbolic links can be unsafe if you don't know exactly what you are doing. Please visit %s to learn more.
items.translation: 从含有符号链接的文件夹中加载世界可能导致风险，尤其是在你不清楚链接目标内容时。请访问%s了解更多信息。

items.source: Understanding the context behind receiving an advancement can help us better understand and improve the progression of the game.
items.translation: 了解达成进度前后发生的事情有助于我们更好了解及改进游戏流程。

items.source: 32-bit system detected: this may prevent you from playing in the future as a 64-bit system will be required!
items.translation: 检测到32位系统：未来将需要64位系统，使用32位系统可能将无法进行游戏！
单击鼠标右键收纳物品

items.source: Press enter to enable the narrator
No items were found on player %s
items.translation: 未能从玩家%s找到任何物品

items.source: Couldn't grant criterion '%s' of advancement %s to %s players as they already have it
items.translation: 无法将进度%2$s的达成条件“%1$s”赋予%3$s名玩家，因为他们已达成此条件
你的游戏时长已达%s小时

items.source:
This key is also used for:
%s

Errors in currently selected data packs prevented the world from loading.
You can either try to load it with only the vanilla data pack ("safe mode"), or go back to the title screen and fix it manually.
items.translation:
当前选中的数据包中出现了错误，导致世界无法加载。
你可以尝试仅加载原版数据包（“安全模式”）或回到标题屏幕手动修复该问题。

items.source: %1$s was squashed by a falling anvil while fighting %2$s
items.translation: %1$s在与%2$s战斗时被下落的铁砧压扁了

items.source: Controls whether players are allowed to enter the Nether.
items.translation: 控制玩家能否进入下界。

items.source: No activity for the past %s day(s)
Your ban will be removed on %s

items.translation: 警告：在线游戏由第三方提供
谷冈久美 - An Ordinary Day

items.source: Invalid boolean: expected 'true' or 'false' but found '%s'
items.translation: 无效的布尔型数据：应为“true”或“false”，实际为“%s”

items.source: A player is required to run this command here
items.translation: 需要一名玩家来执行此命令
自动（取决于首个加入会话的玩家）

items.source: Loading packs with symbolic links can be unsafe if you don't know exactly what you are doing. Please visit %s to learn more.
items.translation: 继续操作前请知晓，加载含有符号链接的包可能会有风险。请访问%s了解更多信息。

items.source: Block property missing. Expected property %s to be %s
items.translation: 缺少方块属性。属性%s应为%s

items.source: Unable to run test instance at %s, %s, %s since it has an undefined test
items.translation: 存在未定义的测试，无法在%s, %s, %s处运行测试实例

items.source: Minecraft will soon require a 64-bit system, which will prevent you from playing or using Realms on this device. You will need to manually cancel any Realms subscription.
items.translation: Minecraft不久后需要64位系统才能运行，届时你将无法使用该设备进行游戏或使用Realms服务。你需要自行取消所有Realms订阅。

items.source:
Welcome to Minecraft!

Would you like to enable the Narrator or visit the Accessibility Settings?
items.translation:
欢迎进入Minecraft！

需要启用复述功能或访问辅助功能设置吗？

items.source: Kill five unique mobs with one crossbow shot
items.translation: 用弩一发击杀五种生物
F3 + H = 显示高级提示框
